visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A night-time exterior shot of a large building with the 'Daiso' logo illuminated in red, suggesting a retail environment. (2) Inside the store, a hand holds a box of 'Retinol 500 IU Serum' against a shelf filled with the same product; the hand then moves to show a small white bottle and a blue box of 'Extra Super 9'. (3) A close-up split screen shows a 'before' and 'after' comparison of human skin on a nose, displaying a significant reduction in visible pores and blackheads. (4) A young woman with her hair pulled back by yellow clips appears, holding the 'Extra Super 9' products in front of her face in a well-lit indoor setting. (5) Close-up shots show a hand demonstrating a textured white cotton pad, pointing out its rough and smooth sides. (6) The hand pours liquid from a bottle onto the pad, and the woman then applies the damp pad specifically to her nose. (7) She removes the pad after a time-lapse, rubs the area, and then introduces a 'Mint AHA' green mud mask, which she applies generously around her nose. (8) The woman is seen massaging the mud mask, then rinsing it off with water in a bathroom sink. (9) She proceeds to apply a clear liquid from a 'Madeca 21' ampoule using a dropper, followed by the 'Retinol' serum from the beginning. (10) The final phase shows her giving a thumbs-up to the camera with a clear, glowing complexion, followed by another close-up comparison of her nose and an overview of all the products used.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: DAISO. [Variety]: 韓國大創. (2) [Variety]: 超高CP值! 養鼻組合. (3) [Variety]: 臺幣400不到. (4) [Variety]: 使用前. 粗糙鼻變光滑鼻. 使用後. (5) [Variety]: 使用前注意事項. (6) [Variety]: ! 貼心小提醒 ! 有分粗糙面跟細緻面. (7) [Variety]: 細緻面的話是貼皮膚. 粗糙面的話是等一下要把粉刺磨掉的. (8) [Variety]: 第一步驟. 黑頭護理液把鼻貼用濕. (9) [Variety]: 讓細緻面服貼著鼻子. (10) [Variety]: 等待10-15分鐘. 就可以用粗糙面搓一搓. (11) [Variety]: 接著用去角質泥膜. (12) [Variety]: 均勻塗抹在鼻子四周. 然後輕輕的按摩一下. (13) [Variety]: 3-5分鐘後. 在用清水清洗乾淨. (14) [Variety]: 接著用舒緩膠囊安瓶. 小心小分! (15) [Variety]: 來補充水分. (16) [Variety]: 最後再抹上精華霜. (17) [Variety]: 縮小緊緻毛孔. 就完成啦. (18) [Variety]: 使用前毛孔超大. 使用後緊實且光滑. (19) [Variety]: \趕快截圖/ 臺幣400元不到!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing the skincare demonstration.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with dark hair held back by clips, wearing a brown fuzzy zip-up jacket, demonstrating a skincare routine.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves between an outdoor street view at night showing a Daiso building, a retail store aisle with skincare shelves, and a personal home bathroom or vanity area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with upbeat, fast-tempo acoustic guitar music. A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Traditional Chinese, setting a cheerful and engaging tone for a product review. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect punctuates her mention of the 'Daiso' brand. The narration is clear and well-paced, following the fast rhythm of the music. (3) As the demonstration transitions, subtle sound effects of plastic rustling and liquid pouring are audible, accompanying the visual of opening products. (4) The speaker's tone remains consistently friendly and animated throughout the multi-step instructional phase. (5) Higher-pitched 'pop' sound effects are used to highlight transition points between skincare steps. (6) The video concludes with the same high-energy BGM and vocal delivery, ending on a positive and encouraging note.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Demo -> Comparison -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and provide a step-by-step tutorial for an affordable nose skincare routine using products found at Daiso Korea, specifically targeting blackhead removal and pore tightening.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed showcasing of specific brand logos, product packaging, and praising the price-performance ratio while identifying the retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a typical fast-paced social media beauty tutorial with heavy use of text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement. The content focuses on 'budget-friendly' solutions, which is a major trend in short-form lifestyle videos.
